name: 7A Ranch
description: Come play pickleball at 7A Ranch in Wimberley, TX! There are 2 outdoor concrete and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to food and restrooms. The courts can be reserved.
fees: Fee required — Day pass varies for time of year.  $15 Fri-Sun May-September; $10 Mon-Thurs May-September; $5 Oct-April Mon-Wed Locals

name: Buck's Backyard
description: Buck's Backyard is a place to play pickleball in Buda, TX. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include food, restrooms, and water.

name: CTX Fieldhouse
description: CTX Fieldhouse is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Buda, TX. There are 12 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Cypress Creek Church
description: Cypress Creek Church is a place to play pickleball in Wimberley, TX. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water. The courts are free.

name: Cypress Falls
description: Cypress Falls is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wimberley, TX. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Hays Communities YMCA
description: Hays Communities YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Buda, TX. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include food, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Free for YMCA members. $10 drop in fee per visit for Non-Members

name: Horseshoe Ridge RV Resort
description: Horseshoe Ridge RV Resort is a place to play pickleball in Wimberley, TX. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, food, and wheelchair accessibility. You can’t reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $20 day use fee to play. Provides access to all resort amenities

name: Jack C Hays Trail & Hellman
description: Come play pickleball at Jack C Hays Trail & Hellman in Kyle, TX! There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Pickle Y’all
description: Members can bring ( 5 ) guest players at NO CHARGE when booking a session on any of the courts.

name: Plum Creek
description: Come play pickleball at Plum Creek in Kyle, TX! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are private.

name: Rio Vista Park
description: Rio Vista Park is a place to play pickleball in San Marcos, TX. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Sage Hill Inn & Spa
description: Sage Hill Inn & Spa is a pickleball resort located in Kyle, Texas that features four lighted pickleball courts and a pavilion. Our large pavilion is next to the courts and offers a nice spot to relax and grab a snack or drink. It’s a great place to take a short break from pickleball, watch the game on the 82” TV above the fireplace, host a business meeting, celebrate a birthday, special event, or just watch the beautiful Texas Hill Country sun sets. We host a wide variety of events and clinics for players of all skill levels. If you are interested in hosting an event or coming out to play please contact Michelle King at michelle@sagehill.com, call (737) 264-4400, or fill out a form online today!
open_play_schedule: Visit our website to view our pickleball events schedule.
fees: Fee required — Please contact Michelle King at michelle@sagehill.com, call (737) 264-4400, or visit our website for more information.

name: San Marcos Activity Center
description: San Marcos Activity Center is a place to play pickleball in San Marcos, TX. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Schatziland Pickleball
description:
4 permanent courts in excellent condition. Courts are fenced and newly resurfaced. Great for individual-group and tournament play.
Membership is available or daily fee.
open_play_schedule: Open seven days per week and most holidays. Daily play begins at 8am until dark. Lights will be installed in early 2025.
fees: Private — Daily fee is $10 for non members. Check with Pro for membership details. RV Resort guests pay no fees.

name: Springs Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Springs Family YMCA in Dripping Springs, TX! There are 7 wood and asphalt courts. 5 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, locker rooms, lights, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available.
fees: Members only — $15 per visit or free with YMCA membership

name: The Emily Ann Theatre
description: The Emily Ann Theatre is a place to play pickleball in Wimberley, TX. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Unity Pickleball
description: The pickleball courts (4) and a tennis court (1) are located on the church grounds at Unity of Wimberley, in the heart of the Texas Hill Country.  These are the first pickleball courts open to the public in Wimberley, Texas.  Courts are $20 per hour or $5 for open play.  To reserve a court, go to the church website:  https://unityofwimberley.com/pages/pickleball
